subcodes.first_line: O friends! The earth of divine knowledge hath been found desolate and in ruins; therefore the Wise and Consummate Husbandman [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان ارض معرفت رحمن خراب و ویران مشاهده شد لذا زارع بالغ و حکیم حاذق
subcodes.subjects: @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
